_note: spike/registry.json — the v1.1.1 registry representation of the SAME Sign-in content as spike/monolith.html. Component render-function BODIES are NOT stored here; the render generator owns them (lever 1). Only data lives here. measure.py slices sub-objects out of this file as the registry READ context per tweak.

components.name: Text input
components.meta: Email + password fields across Sign in, Register.

uiLogic.rule: Show only after blur or submit.

usage.placement: One field per row inside the auth card.

components.name: Button
components.meta: Primary CTA on Sign in and Register.

uiLogic.rule: Disable while the form is submitting.

usage.placement: Full-width at the foot of the auth card.

components.name: OTP input

uiLogic.rule: Auto-advance on input; submit on last digit.

usage.placement: Centered under the Verify email title.

screens.name: Sign in

elements.label: Welcome back. Enter your details to continue.

logicNotes: On 401: show form-level error, keep email.

screens.name: Create account

elements.label: A few details and you're in.

screens.name: Verify email

elements.label: Enter the 6-digit code we sent you.

flow.html:
Test checklist

  1. Sign in with email + password
  2. Verify via 6-digit OTP
